entry.title: Re: Mid year go live procedure for Oman Payroll for Absences
entry.content: Team, any inputs?!

entry.title: Re: Null values handling using LINK function in data acti...
entry.content:
Hi azm_azm, 

  Maybe you can try to have an additional IFELSE clause to explicitly check = Null . 

   In addition, also would recommend you to see if you can avoid null check according the best practice mentioned here: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/fa558b0ff273475c8f3cfa0053a5d89e.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This is a task in the July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs".

This task focuses a little more on the plain service you set up in the previous task, and is more for us to think more about the differences and similarities between services served with the OData and "REST" protocols.

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task.

If you already have the basic plain service you set up in the the previous task, then you actually have everything you need to submit a test request to the TESTER.

Why? Because this time, your submission to the tester will be to ask it to retrieve and check ... the service document of your service.

As well as submitting your service to the TESTER, we want you to share your thoughts on this "service document". What's in it? What happens when you add an entity definition to the plain service, in the CDS model? Does it make sense to have such a service document? Does it differ from a service document of an OData service? If so, how? (Hint: Use the appropriate annotation to switch and see what happens).

In addition, here's another aspect to ponder, and we'd love to hear your thoughts on this. OData is a fantastic example of a RESTful API. One of the well known documents that every OData service offers is the metadata document, at the path /$metadata. This is a rich (EDMX-based) description of everything that the OData service offers.

While there's a "service document" of sorts in a plain "REST" protocol served service, is there an equivalent? What else might be useful here? (Hint: have a look at the options in the cds compile command).

Submitting to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service, with the service document, to the TESTER!

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: plain-serviceDocument.

You'll have already done this sort of thing previously so just head back there for the more detailed instructions if you need them, or to the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post.

You'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "plain-serviceDocument"
}
And, just as with the previous (and all further tasks):

  • the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro")

  • the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service (see ℹ️ A note on URLs and services). Note that the service document will be at the same URL.

That's it!

Logging of test results

Remember that you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants - all requests are logged and are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

Until the next task, have fun, and if you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: Error while creating a BP CR using class CL_MDG_BP_2_STAGING
entry.content:
I am creating a BP CR using class CL_MDG_BP_2_STAGING which internally calls Gov API. I am able to create a CR and I can see the CR in NWBC as well but when I try to open the CR, it throws an error "In this process the navigation to the Single Object Maintenance was not allowed with Error code MDG_BS_BP010.

Please help.

entry.title: Re: Connecting an application on Kyma with an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @MarcelloUrbani 

I found the fix for the above ERROR. 

With multiple cloud connectors i.e. connector with a unique location ID can be called from a Kyma deployed app using the following request header, 

 

 headers: {"SAP-Connectivity-SCC-Location_ID": "YOUR_UNIQUE_LOCATION_ID"}

 

Reference link: https://github.com/SAP-samples/kyma-runtime-extension-samples/blob/main/connectivity-proxy/k8s/function.yaml

Thanks,

Sarbajeet

entry.title: Re: Calling OData services in SAP Digital Mnaufacturing
entry.content:
Hi @ManoelCosta,

Yes, the http://{host}:{port} we are using is correct and accessible. We have cross-checked the destination details in Business Settings of DM, and also with the Basis team. The destination setup seems to be right and working. 

The API that we are trying to hit is active and accessible in SAP Gateway. It also returns the data properly on Postman when triggered using the IP address of the On-Prem System. Only when using the web server and other setups in DM I'm unable to get any response from the API. I've also raised an OSS ticket to address this issue.

My main concern was that am I using the right process to call an ODATA API or not. 

Thanks & Regards,
Harsh.

entry.title: Stamp Duty Tax Configuration in SAP Business One for Morocco in France Localization
entry.content:
Scenario

As per Moroccan government norms, each sales invoice has a 0.25% stamp duty tax for all cash customers. Importantly, the tax should be calculated at the document level, not at the row or item level.

Currently, we have experience configuring tax codes at the row or item level according to government norms but are not aware of how to configure tax at the document level. It seems it might not be possible directly.

Assistance Needed

Please help us sort out this issue at the earliest. Specifically, we need guidance on:

  1. How to configure the stamp duty tax at the document level.
  2. Any workaround will be there if its not available in standard SAP B1

entry.title: sap ePP/DS product planning table: resource view periodic: need to see the resource load in hours
entry.content:
Hi,

 

the resources in the resource view periodic in the PPT are showing only the resource load in %. 

what is it required to see also the available capacity and capacity load in h?

thanks in advance and have a good day!

Walter

entry.content:
Hi; How did you solve it?

I need extra custom field in contact person.

I can't find ant solution.

entry.title: Re: Posting Journal Entries with Tax Using SOAP Posting APIs
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for the interesting question.

As I know for the development experts, tax amounts must be calculated before calling the Posting APIs and the APIs are designed not to check or handle specific tax errors, such as incorrect amount. 

Best Regards,

Alice

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Managing app lifecycle impacts on users

I have a question for you : I ´ve just read the document concerning « succesor app » for installing the new fiori app instead using deprecated/obsolete fiori apps. My question is concerning testing and change users management : as the tile screen will probably change in the new one, what is your « best practice » for helping users not to be « lost » with new tiles on their FLP. Second question : we have replace obsolete tiles but what about variants or others parmeters installed by user in the « old » tile ? Could they use it in the « new » tile ? Thanks a lot Jocelyn.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408亮点前瞻：用户体验（User Experience）
entry.content:
从2408版本开始，空间和页面（Spaces and Pages）将正式成为全新的UI界面展示方式，旧的分组（Group）模式将推出历史舞台。

 

非生产系统：目前已经全面运行在空间和页面模式中，旧的分组模式已不可用。

生产系统：在2408版本升级之前，允许用户切换回旧的分组模式。

 

如果还想了解如何做具体的空间和页面的切换步骤，请参考以下文章：

How to Efficiently Switch from Groups to Spaces an... - SAP Community

 

其他更多信息，请参考最新KBA文档：

2970113 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Replacement of SAP Fiori launchpad home page (Outdated) by Spaces and Pages / Final Removal - SAP for Me

entry.title: Update email recipient in EWA report
entry.content:
Need to change email recipients in existing EWA report, unable to find the appropriate place, please guide.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Update email recipient in EWA report
entry.content:
Hi Customer,

Regarding your concern, please go through KBA 2282944 - EarlyWatch Alert: Solution Manager 7.2 how to setup/configure EWA reports or add email recipients.

It will show you the details.

Sincerely,

Yuki

SAP Support

entry.title: Reduce the size of the data file by using RESIZE
entry.content:
How can the size of Oracle data files be reduced to increase their utilization and lower the rent charges on storage disk volumes?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reduce the size of the data file by using RESIZE
entry.content:
If the data file is too large and the utilization is low, you can reduce the size of the data file by using RESIZE:

ALTER DATABASE DATAFILE '<file>' RESIZE <new_size>;

 

Refer to below Oracle documentations :

Manually Resizing a Data File: https://docs.oracle.com/en/database/oracle/oracle-database/19/admin/managing-data-files-and-temp-files.html#GUID-DF13C755-D423-49F1-9B53-F36B642D2A81

Please find attached a screenshot with the authorizations to be clarified.

entry.title: Re: No Available Stock error in Batch Split (VL02N)
entry.content:
Hi,

check SAP Notes 1513607

Please pay special attention to point 4, which often leads to confusing ATP results

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content:
Hi @JefB 

I'm struggling with a similar issue. Therefore I was very happy to read this thread and try your proposed code.

However, when that is tried, it gives the error message that the operator "/" cannot be calculated. I think the reason for that is because this is done on a dimension instead of measure.

Therefore, I was curious if you have any suggestions on how to overcome that issue?

entry.title: SAP VC Net requirement calculation for components considering batch characteristics values
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m looking for a solution/work around for the below scenario related with variant configuration in steel roofing sheet manufacturing scenario.

  • Variant configuration is used with length as parameter. (Customer specific length)
  • Finished product is the steel roofing sheet, stock is kept at EA, not in length as it varies from sales order to sales order.
  • Steel rolls are used as the prime component for steel roofing sheet production. Rolls are kept and consumed in unit of measure KG.  KG to meter conversion is maintained in material master.
  • Steel roofing sheet is produced by passing roll in a pressing/shaping machine and cutting it to get the required length of the sheet.
  • Left over roll pieces are measured in weigh (KG) and length (M).
  • Left over roll piece be entered as by product (same material code for steel roll) during order confirmation in KG (movement type 531). Length will be entered as batch characteristic. (Length wise batches will be maintained)

 

Problem is in the net requirement calculation for steel rolls when there are left over pieces of steel rolls exists in stock in multiple lengths. (steel rolls are collectively planned ,not sales order specific)

For an example requirement is 10 KG, that is 5 sheets of 2 Meters in length. (Assuming 1KG =1 M for steel roll)

In the stock, there is 6-meter length piece and 4, 1 meter length pieces are there totaling 10 KG requirements. So, no procurement proposals will be created. How ever in reality those 4 pieces cannot be used due to their length is < than required length of 2 meter.

Requirement is to exclude the leftover pieces batches in net requirement calculation when a piece length is < required length from Finished roofing sheet.

I’m looking for a solution/workaround within SAP PP.

Appreciate your input on this.

Note: SAP S/4 Hana version 2020, and PPDS is not implemented.

Regards,

Arjuna

entry.title: Re: Encountering Primary Key Requirement in a CAP Project...
entry.content: You can find it here in the release notes of CDS 8: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/jun24#odata-entities-must-have-a-key

entry.title: Re: When creating a BOM we are getting the error "Enter a...
entry.content: As a solution change the BOM header base quantity to a larger number. With every factor 10 you add in the header you move the decimal 1 position to the left until you have the 3 decimals (or less) left. (see attachment)

entry.title: How to Create Maintenance Plan (IP01) With Existing Maintenance Items Through Custom BAPI.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have developed custom BAPI using MPLAN_CREATE, but using this BAPI I am able to create Maintenance Plan with new Maintenance Items, but I want to create Maintenance Plan with Existing Maintenance Items. can anyone knows any other standard BAPI or any custom BAPI code for this requirement.

Regards,

Satheesh Kumar .

entry.title: Re: No Available Stock error in Batch Split (VL02N)
entry.content:
Hello @jlopez2023 

Make sure to run CO09 with the correct checking rule, which is B for deliveries. Verify that there is enough stock available on all the levels, i.e. 

  • plant level
  • storage location level
  • batch level

Consult the note 1893237 - Everything about transaction Co09

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: No Available Stock error in Batch Split (VL02N)
entry.content: Please check the best before date of the batch and see if there are any batch determination rules that consider the best before date (like minimum 30 days until best before date is reached in the search criteria).

entry.title: Re: R47 Delete ABAP Session after Error
entry.content: Hi Subasri,

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I hope this message finds you well. My name is Arpit, and I recently graduated with a keen interest in building a career in consulting, specifically through SAP certification. Your recent post has been incredibly insightful and has greatly aided my understanding of SAP and its applications in the consulting domain.

Thank you for sharing such valuable information. I look forward to exploring further opportunities in SAP consulting and leveraging this knowledge to advance my career aspirations.

Best regards,

Arpit

entry.title: Re: Query for which sales order lines has the discount or...

entry.title: Service Unavailable - 503 After Deployment in SAP BTP Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on an SAP BTP Cockpit project. I have successfully created and run a simple project locally. However, after deploying the project, I encountered an issue when accessing 

The error message displayed is "Service Unavailable," and the detailed error log is as follows:


"msg":"Acquiring client from pool timed out. Please review your system setup, transaction handling, and pool configuration. Pool State: borrowed: 0, pending: 0, size: 1, available: 0, max: 100","stacktrace":["TimeoutError: Acquiring client from pool timed out. Please review your system setup, transaction handling, and pool configuration. Pool State: borrowed: 0, pending: 0, size: 1, available: 0, max: 100","at ResourceRequest._fireTimeout (/home/vcap/deps/0/node_modules/generic-pool/lib/ResourceRequest.js:62:17)","at Timeout.bound
"

It seems there is an issue with the connection pool configuration or transaction handling.

Actions Taken:

  • Verified local setup: The project runs successfully on the local environment.
  • Checked deployment steps: Ensured all deployment steps were followed as per the SAP guidelines.

Request for Assistance:

  • Could you please provide guidance on how to resolve this issue?
  • Are there specific configurations for the connection pool that I might be missing?
  • Any insights on transaction handling that could be causing this timeout?

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,

[Rituraj Kumar]

entry.title: Re: Maximize Value with Value Analytics for SAP Ariba
entry.content:
2 questions related to the Ariba extractor App:

- can we expect SAP to maintain it in case of Ariba data model evolution or is it just a sample app to be maintained by customer ?
- If it is maintained by SAP and that customer can enhance it at the same time, is there some best practice to follow when enhancing it to easily reintegrate new version provided by SAP ?

entry.title: Re: Any correction program to update or refresh mfg and exp date in COA?
entry.content: My guess is that there is something wrong in the coding in your form since also the date in the header section of your document shows 00.00.0000

entry.title: Fiori deployment on ABAP server.
entry.content:
Hello all!

I have successfully deployed applications to abap server using fiori tools. Unfortunately I have some small problems, but I can't find a solution.

After deployment the application launches, but I get an error in the console that “getBindingContext” is null which is strange to me because when I launch the application locally everything works without a problem.

The second issue is the application has a problem loading

sap/ui/core/Theming and sap/base/i18n/Localization

Could this be because the SAPUI5 version on the ABAP server is old, 1.108.22 to be exact?

The partly solution for the second issue was disabling those two liblaries. When I run this app locally evertyhing is working fine. 

I'm using the newest version of https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial.

Cheers!

entry.title: Re: Task 5 - A "REST" service document (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&quot
entry.content:
While my test was successful, I thought I'd investigate some of the extra activities you suggested.

I tried to use the --to mermaid option with cds compile, but I was getting an error about a missing model processor, so I thought I'd get the latest cds

After I ran

 

npm i  /cds-dk

 

I still don't have access to the model. Is there something else I need to do?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Sales quote amount does not match with the contract a...
entry.content:
Dear Khaled,

thank you very much for taking the time to answer, but I meant the contract object and not the sales orders.

entry.title: Re: 按单销售业务------销售退货的E库存转公司普通非限制库存报错：物料在工厂、库位不存在
entry.content:
如果使用的是客户退货标准方案（Scope Item BKP），销售退货单收货后会放置到E库存，可以直接使用标准的流程来进行库存类型的转换。

- 使用输入检验结果 MSR_INSPWH App ， 如果需要转移到普通非限制库存，可以使用物流后续活动 0011 转储至非限制库存。系统会自动生成对应的物料凭证。不需要使用MIGO来进行操作。

- 可以查看下E库存和非限制库存是否配置使用的同一个库位。

- 同时，如果使用的标准方案，不建议单独使用MIGO来做物料移动管理。

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content: Hi, if you share your exact code it would be easier to recommend a solution. On MichalCK's code above I'm not so sure the division in IF works as is (at least not without round brackets () around it) and I would try to do it with something like IF RESULTLOOKUP()>0 THEN DELETE([d/CustomerGroup] = "#") ENDIF

entry.title: Re: Cloud Identity services neo migration to cloud foundry
entry.content: Hi Marhol, thank you for the blogs and official documentation. When looking at the screen of our IAS system, I am hoping that it has already been migrated by SAP itself. I can see the logo of Cloud Identity services, not the IAS Identity Authentication services. How can we verify whether our IAS/IPS system is migrated to a Multi-Cloud environment? It’s similar to moving the IAS/IPS tenant from SAP-hosted NEO Data Centers to Multi-Cloud Data Centers hosted by AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

entry.title: Waterfall Chart: Color Subtotals like Increase / Decrease
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

in Waterfall Chart in SAC we want to color a subtotal bar according to its value. We can switch between 3 and 4 colors in waterfall color layout. If we select three colors, subtotal is colored like a total. When we change to 4 colors, we can define a certain color for subtotals. But we want the subtotal bar to change its color according to the value.

In the following screenshot the second bar should be formatted like the following bars. (green or red according to its value)

 

Is this possible somehow? Am I missing something here. Datasource is BW4HANA live connection. Subtotal is a hierarchy node in BW.

An alternative could be, to not show the subtotal bar at all, but only the child nodes. But I have not found a way to do this either, so far.

Any help is much appreciated. Thanks.

Dominik

entry.title: Delivery note to Pick List link query SAP Business One HANA
entry.content:
Dear all,

I need a query which connect the delivery note to relevant pick list, SAP Business One HANA.

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Re: ConfirmedDeliveryDate in Order_Confirmation is differ...
entry.content:
Hi @JMManalo, 

Could you please double-check the confirmed delivery date and time (edatu and ezeit) in the schedule line of the order? 

Currently, the system will always convert the confirmed date and time to UTC-based time with refer to the system time zone. 

Best regards,

Troy

entry.title: Re: cost component structure split in SAP S/4HANA Public...
entry.content: Hi Buddy， I would recommend you to go throught the help doc link below for your issue https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/7f47a6d9441c46ac86c96fd27f6015f0/82a6d7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US Best regards, Bob

entry.title: Re: Is extensibility possible to upload more than 999 lin...
entry.content:
Hello Ajit, Thanks for your interest on the Upload Customer Open Items App.

You mentioned two limitations:

  1. For one invoice, you can enter max 999 line items
  2. You can enter max 2000 lines in the excel file for uploading. (which means in extrem case, if each invoice has 999 line items, then you can input only 2 such invoices in the excel file)

As to the first limitation, We are working on a standard solution, then you will be able to upload a invoice with more than 999 line items and post this invoice. Such solution planned be released in next major cloud release (2502)

As to the second limitation, we limit 2000 line items due to performance consideration. What is your expected line items in your case?

Best Regards,

Victor

entry.title: Migration from RHEL6.6 in on-premise to RHEL 7.x in AWS environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We plan to migrate the current ERP6.0 system running in the on-premise environment to AWS environment.

The current ERP6.0 system is utilizing "OS: RHEL 6.6 ,DB :OracleDB IP_ADDRESS" .

As we cannot use RHEL6.6 in AWS environment, we must use RHEL7.x in AWS environment.

If we migrate the current ERP 6.0 system running on RHEL 6.6 and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in the on-premise environment to the server running RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS in AWS environment, 

can you please tell us if there is anything we need to do on the RHEL 7.x and Oracle DB IP_ADDRESS server side?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration from RHEL6.6 in on-premise to RHEL 7.x in A...
entry.content:
Migrating an ERP system to AWS involves several steps and considerations. Since you are moving from RHEL 6.6 to RHEL 7.x, there are some key differences between the two operating systems that you need to account for. Here are some general steps and considerations for your migration:

  1. Compatibility Check: Ensure that your ERP 6.0 system is compatible with RHEL 7.x. Check with the ERP vendor for any specific requirements or compatibility issues.

  2. Update and Patch: Before migrating, make sure that your current system is fully updated and patched. This will help to minimize compatibility issues during the migration.

  3. Backup: Take a full backup of your ERP system, including the database and any customizations, configurations, and files.

  4. AWS Preparation:

    • Set up your AWS environment, including VPC, subnets, security groups, IAM roles, and policies.
    • Choose an appropriate EC2 instance type for your ERP system.
    • Set up your storage on AWS (EBS, S3, etc.) according to your performance and redundancy requirements.

  5. RHEL 7.x Preparation:

    • Install RHEL 7.x on your AWS EC2 instance.
    • Apply the latest updates and security patches to RHEL 7.x.
    • Install any required libraries or dependencies that your ERP system may need.
    • Adjust system parameters and kernel settings as per the requirements of the ERP system and Oracle DB.

  6. Oracle DB Preparation:

    • Install Oracle DB 12.1.0.2 on RHEL 7.x, ensuring it matches the configuration of your on-premise setup.
    • Apply any patches or updates to Oracle DB to match the on-premise version.
    • Configure the database with the same parameters and settings as your on-premise environment.

  7. Data Migration:

    • Migrate the database using tools like Oracle Data Pump, RMAN, or AWS Database Migration Service (DMS).
    • Test the data integrity and consistency after migration.

  8. Application Migration:

    • Transfer the ERP application files to the AWS environment.
    • Update any configuration files to reflect the new environment (e.g., database connection strings, file paths).

  9. Testing:

    • Perform thorough testing in the AWS environment to ensure that the ERP system is functioning correctly.
    • Test all functionalities, including transactions, reports, and integrations.

  10. Update DNS and Networking:

    • Update DNS records to point to the new AWS environment.
    • Ensure that all networking is correctly configured, including VPNs or Direct Connect if necessary.

  11. Monitoring and Optimization:

    • Implement monitoring solutions to keep an eye on the performance and health of your ERP system.
    • Optimize the system based on the performance data collected.

  12. Documentation and Training:

    • Update your documentation to reflect the new environment and any changes made during the migration.
    • Train your staff on any new procedures or tools related to the AWS environment.

  13. Go-Live and Support:

    • Plan a go-live date and ensure that you have support in place for any issues that may arise during the transition.

Remember, this is a high-level overview, and each migration will have its own unique challenges and requirements. It's crucial to work closely with your ERP vendor, Oracle, and possibly an AWS consultant to ensure a smooth migration. Additionally, consider the AWS Well-Architected Framework to ensure best practices in security, reliability, performance efficiency, cost optimization, and operational excellence.

entry.title: Re: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Integrate Jira with SAP CPI - Create Jira ticket via SAP CPI
entry.content: Hello, once the content type is maintained as application/json, this issue is solved.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Warehouse Cloud connect to PostgreSQL
entry.content:
Hi kpsauer,

Can we do Pull and push data from PostgreSQL(MDO)(Cloud) to SAP Datasphere? with JDBC or any other way?

Kind regards

Tejas

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content:
Dear Shilpa,

Thank you for considering my request. At Henkel, we believe we have a strong competency in topics like Build, CAPM, and RAP, thanks to our extensive development efforts supported by SAP. Therefore, we are now interested in exploring advanced event mesh or machine learning.

I would greatly appreciate it if you could share any opportunities for conducting a CodeJam on other newly released topics from SAP side.

Thank you.

entry.title: Purchase Requisition screen controls
entry.content:
Dear all,

In PR creation-ME51N (& change-ME52N) screen, i want to make the below changes. where can i configure the changes.

1. I am able to save the PR by maintaining past Delivery date, which the system should not allow, an error message should be shown. 

2. Requisition date can be maintained with past and future date, which should not be allowed, always the PR should be created in the Current Date, an error message should be shown when user enters a past/future date. or else, the system should by default take the Currernt date and the field should be greyed out so that user cannot make any changes. (refer above pic)

3. system allows user to maintain PR Release date in past date, which should not be allowed, the Release date can never be in the past date. (refer above pic)

4. For material PR, the Account Assignment Category tab in the Line Item (Fund, Fund Centre & Commitment Item) details is fetched automatically, but all are enabled i.e, user can still modify the fields which should be greyed out and the users should not be able to modify.    

please guide me the configuration steps and path for doing the above.

entry.title: Re: SAP
entry.content: Try to indicate an adequate question title.

entry.title: Re: An Introduction to Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

THANK YOU for the good overview of the current functionalities regarding hierarchies. The functions that are not yet supported are particularly interesting, as a very important function for us is currently missing.
The authorizations in BW4 (analysis authorizations) are based on two authorization-relevant characteristics (profit center and org unit). In each case on hierarchy nodes.

There is currently no authorization function in the Datasphere for hierarchy nodes.
I have not found anything about this in the DSP roadmap explorer either. So the topic does not seem to be relevant for SAP at the moment.
However, I can hardly imagine that only a few other customers want to authorize this.
This means that Datasphere is currently not a replacement/addition for us with regard to authorizations for hierarchies, as the hierarche node authorizations are not possible.

Are there any work arounds?

Two more questions (nothing was mentioned here):
Are there version-dependent hierarchies (as in BW)?
Are there intervals (not just single values) possible in characteristic nodes in hierarchies?


Best regards

entry.title: EPM 刷新出现错误
entry.content:
HTTP Status:400
[{"code":"SY_530","description":"出现异常","severity":"error","log_id":"VoeogAEF7k{HWRCU627ucm","variables":[{"key":"DATAVALUE","value":""},{"key":"MDX","value":""},{"key":"V1","value":""},{"key":"V2","value":""},{"key":"V3","value":""},{"key":"V4","value":""}]},{"code":"UJ0_EXCEPTION_005","description":"出现异常","severity":"error","log_id":"VoeogAEF7k{HWRCU627ucm","variables":[{"key":"FUN_NAME","value":""},{"key":"OBJ_NAME","value":""}]}]

Class:CL_UJO_QUERY_BASE Method:DO_QUERY_CORE Line:226 Text: 出现异常
Class:CL_UJO_QUERY_BASE Method:RUN_RSDRI_QUERY_CORE Line:328 Text: NetWeaver BW 出错

entry.title: Focused Build SP14: General improvements in Mass Change Operations and Requirements Management apps
entry.content:
Introduction

With the release of ST-OST Support Package 14 (SP14) for Focused Build in SAP Solution Manager, we have come up with some new and exciting features in Mass Change Operations application and Requirements Management application. The release also contains improvements in some areas of these applications. You can find more information about all the improvements in different areas of the Requirements-To-Deploy process in this blog. 

Mass Change Operations: 

Change of Project Name and Project Phase for Defect Corrections:

In the Defect Corrections process type, users can now modify the Project Name and Project Phase columns in the result list table, provided the following prerequisites are fulfilled:

An Open Defect Correction:

  • is set to a user status below 'Handed Over to Release', and
  • has the Priority 'Medium' or 'Low' and
  • has no Work Package Assignment.

Changing only the project name for a defect correction is not permissible. If a project name is selected without selecting any project phase, an error message is raised at the line-item level in result list table and at the field level in the Mass Change dialog.

Fig 1. Mass Change Operations - Defect Corrections Screen

In addition to this, the value help for Project Phase would list only those project phases for the selected project name which fulfil the below condition:

  • The status of the release assigned to project phase must be Prepare or Build. Reassignment is not allowed for the Release Phase 'Created'.
  • If the open Defect Correction has a DocFlow/Task List Assignment, then the Target Release, that is assigned to the selected Project Phase for reassignment, must have a Task List as well.
  • If the open Defect Correction does not have a DocFlow/Task List Assignment, then the Target Release, that is assigned to the selected Project Phase for reassignment, must not have a Task List as well.

The Project Phase value help in the Mass Change dialog also follows the above conditions for the display of project phases.

Redesign of Mass Change Dialog as per SAP Fiori Design Guidelines:

The re-design of Mass Change Dialog is now extended to all the process types. The new Mass Change Dialog follows the SAP Fiori Design guidelines and has the same behavior that was introduced in the Mass Change Dialog for Requirements process type in the past. Please refer this blog for more information.

Requirements Management: 

Assignment of Work Packages to Requirements with no Solution Documentation:

Users can now assign Work Packages, whether they are assigned to a Solution Documentation or not, to Requirements that do not have a Solution Documentation assigned.

In the past, the Assign Work Package dialog would default the Solution filter to 'No Solution' if the selected requirement in the work list had no Solution Documentation assigned to it. This behavior restricted the users from assigning Work Packages with Solution Documentation to such requirements.

Fig 2. Previous behavior - Solution filter was defaulted to 'No Solution'

With the recent update to the Assign Work Package dialog, the Solution filter becomes editable when the selected requirement has no Solution Documentation assigned. This will allow users to search for Work Packages with or without Solution Documentation.

Fig 3. Updated behavior - Solution filter is now editable only for Requirements with No Solution

It is important to note that there is no change in the behavior for Requirements with Solution Documentation. The filter for Solution in Assign Work Package dialog will remain non-editable in such cases.

This fix is available till ST-OST Support Package 12 (SP12) for Focused Build in SAP Solution Manager.

Redesign of WRICEF Sub-Classification field:

Fig 4. Re-designed UI field for WRICEF Sub-classification

The WRICEF Sub-Classification field has been updated to include standard SAPUI5 control, enhancing accessibility and aligning with our product standards. The core functionality of the field remains the same. However, this field has been updated throughout our Focused Build Fiori applications.

Key Takeaways:

  1. Project name and Project phase can be changed from the result list for open Defect Corrections in Mass Change Operations provided certain criteria are met.
  2. The new Mass Change Dialog in accordance with Fiori Design guidelines is now available for all the process types in Mass Change Operations.
  3. Work Packages with Solution Documentation can now be assigned to Requirements that do not have any Solution Documentation assignment.
  4. WRICEF Sub-classification field is re-designed using a standard SAPUI5 control to enhance accessibility. There is no change in the core behavior of the field.

Please feel free to leave feedback in the comment section or submit any questions you may have on this page. You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager and Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager to stay updated with the new features and improvements.

Important Links and Resources

  • Usage Rights
  • Unwrapping the Latest Innovations: Support Package 14 for Focused Build 
  • Learn how SAP Activate and Focused Build with SAP Solution Manager is working together
  • ALM Community page

entry.title: Re: Contract Request document could not be sent to the external system. Error Message: Response retu
entry.content: any resolution to this?

entry.title: Unable to use req.error to throw error if one of the attachment fails
entry.content:
I am from SDM CAP plugin team. user uploads attachments and click on save and all these attachments get saved to SDM repository. One flow here is suppose there are 5 attachments and out of these 5 if 1 attachment is virus prone and clicked on SAVE sdm throws error for virus attachment and other 4 are saved. We want to throw error on UI saying the particular attachment has failed but using req.reject or req.error is not helping because even 4 attachments are saved to SDM repo they are not saved to attachments database ending up with the whole request rejected in draft mode. 

Any solution for this.

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content:
Apologies @JefB, I've tried to code from @MichalCK and to give a snipped of what I've resulted in the error mentioned in my previous message:

This was the closest I came to trying his code.

So indeed the challenge I'm facing is that I have duplicated records where the record is once with Dimension "Deelneming" filled (anything else then "#") and once with it being "#". 

However, I also have cases of Dimension "Deelneming" being "#" where it doesn't contain another value. Those cases I don't want to delete but I only want to delete the cases of the duplicate records.

Hope that makes it a bit more clear, if not please let me know what additionally I need to share to give you a better idea.

entry.title: Can SAP Authenticator add two authentications？
entry.content:
Now I've used two different IdPs.   https://haas.accounts.ondemand.com/  and    https://accounts.sap.com 

But SAP Authenticator can only add validation for one of them at a time.

Can SAP Authenticator add two authentications？

entry.content: My submission!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Create your SAP S/4HANA system in a fraction of the usual
entry.content:
Hi @JoergWolf 

I have installed  and configured the 2023 Fully Activated Appliance in standard system landscape (single box), would you be able to guide whether we can install AWS SDK and OpenAI SDK , both of them in this appliance. This is meant for purpose of developing and creating  the GenAI use cases by interfacing the native cloud services. 

In case you are not able to guide, kindly suggest who can help. 

 Thanks 

Hemant

entry.title: Re: Expiry Access for the System
entry.content:
Hi,
This is what I found as public information about that: 

2075848 - What happens when a customer's license expire for an individual module? - Performance & Goal

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/b36dcb76619a4d34af8937c3e4ecdc51/3858df1de8d44ee59e5f928809545d1a.html 

I guess you can check that on your contract or with the account manager itself. 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: RAP: Activate Draft and trigger Save on custom action (managed scenario with unmanaged save)
entry.content: Hi Ramjee, is there any other way around to this?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

This is a great initiative; I am really interested in SAP SAC. I recently graduated with a degree in IT.

Regards,

Reene

entry.title: Re: MRP Run Parameters of the Monitor material coverage app
entry.content:
Hi Suresh,

Thank you for your question. The Regenerative Planning checkbox is always selected automatically, to make sure that all materials are included in the MRP run. This is a default setting in S/4HANA Cloud and cannot be changed. The checkbox itself is only displayed for information purposes, so that material planners are aware of how the MRP run is performed. We will improve the documentation for the checkbox to include this information.

Best

Antje

entry.title: Re: No Available Stock error in Batch Split (VL02N)
entry.content:
Hello @ArnoBrouwer 

Best before date is not a problem here. Look at the screenshot attached to the original question - it says that selection is executed without selection criteria. The batch is selected but it doesn't have enough available stock. Actually it is not a real problem, it is just a regular business situation. There is not enough stock to cover the delivery. 

The problem is that OP is not able to analyze stock availability.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAC planning model - delete duplicate records
entry.content:
Hi @MaxT,

there is an issue in your code line 3, please try to use

IF RESULTLOOKUP() / RESULTLOOKUP([d/Deelneming] = #GROOTBOEKREKENING) < 1

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal @fjcarrasco the given troubleshoot guide link is not working, it says page not found. Can you share the latest link please ?

entry.title: Re: Entry and Flow of S/4 HANA CATS Time Records
entry.content:
Hi Renee,

maybe you can answer my question: we have to replace SAP CS Modul by the S/4 Hana Service, where we will use the Service Orders. It it possible to book CATS based on S/4 Hana Service Orders instead of an CS-Order?

 

thanks a lot Ursula

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK SDK installation error
entry.content: Please check https://help.sap.com/doc/f53c64b93e5140918d676b927a3cd65b/Cloud/en-US/docs-en/troubleshooting/mdk/common-issues.html#loading-message-displays-while-running-mobile-development-kit-dependency-installer-on-windows-machine

entry.title: Shipping Point assign to several Plants which are in more than one country.
entry.content:
Hello, Gurus

According to the Learning Hub,

Global entities can be assigned to organizational structures in one or more countries. For example, a Shipping Point can be assigned to several Plants which are in more than one country.

Is it possible ? 

Thank you in advance

Park.

entry.title: Re: Download software before the end of maintenance
entry.content: Thanks for the answer, if we restart the support we will get the right to download the software. But the question is that if we have a perpetual license, should not be allowed to download it? including the patches till the moment we stopped the maintenance? As commented we are entitled to do it, but seems impossible to get a clear answer from SAP

entry.title: Re: Replicating SuccessFactors Entities to SAP HANA Cloud...
entry.content: Hi HakanHaslaman, thank you for your answer, but my question is a bit more specific, I am looking for a way to replicate full SF entities into hana cloud db using standard (no customization) sap to sap iFlows, but most preconfigured package in the businessHub or integration suite discovery Center do not allow to do that

entry.title: Re: Add custom tab under "Contact Person Detail" in XD01
entry.content: Hi how did you it? I need to add custom field ın contact person

entry.title: Supplier evaluation
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I need to configure supplier evaluation in current system.

But I have no idea from where I start.

Please guide steps so that successfully create the same. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Supplier evaluation
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

 

In order to implement supplier evaluation, please, check the relevant documentation in fiori library and SAP help: 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2019')/S28OP

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/74dce2577341bd12e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/af9ef57f504840d2b81be8667206d485/4dd9145627e5410ee10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

 

I have sent you the links for overall supplier evaluation, but you can check the rest of the apps if required by navigating from the previous links. Also, please, check the following KBAs so you make sure you do not miss the most relevant configuration steps: 

2843857 - How to maintain the supplier evaluation scores

2585540 - No data in Supplier Evaluation apps - SAP S/4HANA

3205517 - Supplier Evaluation apps are not given correct scores

 

Thanks and regards, 

 

Maria

SAP Product Support

Digital Business Services

entry.title: Re: Create A/R Invoice + Payment using Service Layer
entry.content:
Hi ivarsk2,

As far as I know, it is not possible in Service Layer.

You will have to do it separately only but can be done in a single request.

In a Batch request, create the Invoice first and later create the Payment for the created Invoice.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Forecast prediction periods - SAC
entry.content:
Hello, 
I'm struggling with prediction both in classic and in optimized story:
Classic story: 
I've created a report with actual from January to October - and I want to create a 12 months predictive forecast.
But for some reason both my chart and table, let me forecast only one month
and I can't find where to change this default.
how can it be changed?

Optimized story: 

I can't find how to add the predictive forecast at all, it's not in the menu nor in the chart options:
How does it work?

 

 

 

thank you

entry.title: CAP-App deployment stops without error message
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I have a problem deploying a CAP app. At a certain point the deployment stops and does not continue. There is also no error message.

The process seems to stop here and nothing more happens. Nothing seems to arrive in the database either.
thanks
Heinrich

entry.title: Void unused cheque
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

How to void unused cheque in SAP Public cloud?

We are unable to find the option in manage outgoing checks application.

In on premise we could do so using transaction code FCH3.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Bybit Referans Kodu: ATA1881 (2024 En Güncel Davet Kodu)
entry.content: Bybit referans kodu ATA1881 ile kayıt olarak %30 komisyon indirimi ve 1000$'a varan kayıt bonusundan yararlanabilirsiniz. Bu kodu Bybit'in kayıt sayfasında referans kodu alanına girerek avantajlı teklifleri kullanabilirsiniz.

entry.title: Re: Replicating SuccessFactors Entities to SAP HANA Cloud...
entry.content: Use multiple standard iFlows to replicate SuccessFactors entities into SAP HANA Cloud, though it requires possibly more configuration. Alternatively, a custom iFlow can provide a comprehensive solution with more development effort. If available, SAP Data Services should be also handle this replication, supporting various data sources and complex transformations.

entry.title: Solution for US Payapp in construction
entry.content:
Hi

we are doing construction projects in the US and have to provide payment applications following the rules of the AIA. We were looking for a standard solutiuon in SAP but could not find anything. 

We have now implmented it with a  sales order with Sales Bom to have a prefined structure to cover all relevant information, like values to be billed, Retention and so on. For each payapp of a project, we create new entries in the billing plan of the involved items. The printout will be based on the SD invoice, but the print programm will get the printed information not only from the current invoice but will collect the Information from the comlete document flow. 

Does anybody else did face the question to realise a payapp in SAP? How did you solve the problem?

entry.title: Re: Creating VOFM custom routine, functionality same as SAP standard routine 103 with Additional Fun
entry.content: Very useful document. Thanks for sharing and guiding.

entry.title: Re: MRP Run Parameters of the Monitor material coverage app
entry.content: Thank you for the details.
